text.title: RACI Matrix Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the RACI Matrix methodology end-to-end.

step.name: assign-a-first
step.action: For each task, pick exactly one A.
step.decision-gate: If multiple A's, halt and resolve with lead.

step.name: assign-r-c-i
step.action: Assign R (>=1, may equal A); then C (two-way before) and I (one-way after) distinctly.

step.name: anchor-evidence
step.action: Cite source per named assignment; flag inferred names.

step.name: set-review-cadence
step.action: Set review_due (monthly / quarterly); publish under canonical path.
